notes: Blind inference processed 10 landmark segments. Blind inference used on-device landmark extraction with no expected reference text. Current exact recognizer still has 5 known labels. Event-family hypotheses, lexeme clusters, and phase chains come from motion, handshape, placement, pose, timing, mouth, and visibility cues. Frame extraction requested 140 frame(s), analyzed 140, skipped 0.
